title: TelemetryLogRecord
description: Structured JSON log record every platform hexagon must emit to stdout for Promtail/Loki ingestion. Formalizes observability's telemetry conventions (observability/docs/telemetry-conventions.md). The parallel Prometheus metric label and naming conventions are declared alongside this in $defs (PrometheusMetricLabels, MetricName) for documentation and cross-checking — they are not code-generated as a runtime type since Prometheus labels are attached via the metrics client API (Micrometer, prometheus_client, ...), never built as a JSON document the way a log line is.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601/RFC3339 timestamp of the log line. UTC only.

message.description: Human-readable summary of the log line.

component_id.description: Functional identifier of the emitting hexagon (D002): lowercase hyphenated, no theme words. Same value as the Prometheus component_id label ($defs/PrometheusMetricLabels) and as state.event's componentId (schemas/state-feed/state.event.json) — this is the join key across Prometheus, Loki, and state-feed (Phase C headline bridge). Deliberately snake_case here (and on the Prometheus label) to match Prometheus/Loki field-naming convention, unlike this repo's usual camelCase JSON fields.

appId.description: Present when handling a request in the context of a specific product app (D009). camelCase to match this repo's other JSON fields, deliberately inconsistent with the snake_case component_id/env/app_id Prometheus-style fields.

traceId.description: Reserved for future OpenTelemetry trace correlation. Not yet populated by any hexagon.

PrometheusMetricLabels.title: PrometheusMetricLabels
PrometheusMetricLabels.description: Labels every metric emitted by a platform hexagon must carry, attached via the metrics client API — not a JSON document any hexagon constructs or serializes. additionalProperties is deliberately true: this declares the reserved minimum label set, not an exhaustive one — individual metrics may carry further labels beyond these.

component_id.description: Functional hexagon name (D002). Same identifier used in this schema's own component_id field and in state.event.componentId.

env.description: Injected by Prometheus itself via external_labels (docker/prometheus/prometheus.yml) — hexagons do not emit this label themselves.

app_id.description: Present only for metrics tied to a specific product app (D009). Omit for platform infrastructure metrics.

MetricName.title: MetricName
MetricName.description: Naming pattern for every Prometheus metric emitted by a platform hexagon: platform_<hexagon>_<name>_<unit>, using a standard Prometheus unit suffix (_total for a counter, _seconds for a duration histogram, _bytes for a size, _info for a gauge with metadata). Hyphens in the hexagon's functional name (D002) are written as underscores, since Prometheus metric names cannot contain hyphens.
